description: Process free-form bulk-text dumps that mix tasks, calendar events, notes, recurring rules, observations, and structured facts. Handles the user pasting a multi-item blob into chat ('Task A by Friday. Meeting with Contact A Tue 3pm. Idea: Project X needs a kickoff doc.') and the timer-driven inbox.txt pipeline. Parses every item, deduplicates against existing tasks/events, and emits a multi-file write batch. NEVER creates recurring events as calendar entries — recurring rules become RecurringTasks.
